chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | March 7, 2025 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It includes announcements about events, opportunities, and important dates relevant to the EECS community. Students are encouraged to stay informed through this regular communication to enhance their academic and professional experiences.

The newsletter covers various topics such as upcoming workshops, research opportunities, and faculty announcements. It aims to keep students engaged with department activities and support their educational journey. Regular issues help foster a sense of community and collaboration among EECS students and staff.

Students can access the newsletter online through the EECS website. It is part of the department's efforts to improve communication and resources for undergraduates. For more details or to submit content, contact the EECS undergraduate advising office.
